title: TSE webhooks
subtitle: Outbound integration webhooks for TSE operational events. Secret is sent as X-Tse-Webhook-Secret.
secretNote: HTTPS required except localhost. Failures after 5 attempts mark the webhook as Failing.
deleteConfirmBody: This removes the registration and its delivery history.
emptySelect: Select a tenant to manage TSE webhooks.
forbidden: You do not have permission to view this page.
